requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — Niger Project Evidence and Sahel Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——尼日尔项目证据及萨赫勒降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——尼日項目證據及薩赫勒降額

summary.en: No publicly confirmed Niger EVSE-specific national technical rule was found as of the dataset date. For imported EV charging equipment, the practical technical baseline should be IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging general requirements, IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment, IEC 62196 for couplers, IEC 60529 for enclosure protection, and IEC 61000 for EMC and power quality where project owners, engineers, donors, ARSE, or NIGELEC require IEC evidence. Niger's Sahel environment makes high ambient temperature, dust ingress, UV exposure, surge protection, weak maintenance conditions, and thermal derating central safety issues.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，未发现公开确认的尼日尔EVSE专用国家技术规则。对于进口电动汽车充电设备，实际技术基线应采用IEC 61851-1传导充电通用要求、IEC 61851-23直流电动汽车供电设备、IEC 62196耦合器、IEC 60529外壳防护，以及在项目业主、工程师、捐助方、ARSE或NIGELEC要求IEC证据时采用IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量。尼日尔萨赫勒环境使高环境温度、沙尘侵入、紫外暴露、浪涌保护、维护条件薄弱和热降额成为核心安全问题。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，未發現公開確認的尼日EVSE專用國家技術規則。對於進口電動汽車充電設備，實際技術基線應採用IEC 61851-1傳導充電通用要求、IEC 61851-23直流電動汽車供電設備、IEC 62196耦合器、IEC 60529外殼防護，以及在項目業主、工程師、捐助方、ARSE或NIGELEC要求IEC證據時採用IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量。尼日薩赫勒環境使高環境溫度、沙塵侵入、紫外暴露、浪湧保護、維護條件薄弱和熱降額成為核心安全問題。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 62196 series — plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 communication for DC systems. GB/T 18487.1-2023 is useful engineering evidence but includes China-specific connector and communication assumptions. It does not by itself prove IEC 61851 clause compliance, IEC 62196 connector safety, IP-rated enclosure performance for Sahel dust, or acceptable operation at sustained high ambient temperatures.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并由GB/T 20234接口和直流系统GB/T 27930通信支持。GB/T 18487.1-2023可作为工程证据参考，但包含中国特定接口和通信假设。其本身不能证明IEC 61851逐条符合、IEC 62196接口安全、适用于萨赫勒沙尘的IP防护性能，或持续高环境温度下的可接受运行。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並由GB/T 20234接口和直流系統GB/T 27930通訊支持。GB/T 18487.1-2023可作為工程證據參考，但包含中國特定接口和通訊假設。其本身不能證明IEC 61851逐條符合、IEC 62196接口安全、適用於薩赫勒沙塵的IP防護性能，或持續高環境溫度下的可接受運行。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IEC 62196 connector reports, IP and IK enclosure test evidence, RCD and protective-device ratings, surge-protection evidence, installation instructions in French where required, and derating curves for 45 °C+ outdoor operation with dust loading. A standalone China GB/T safety report is not enough for a Niger project package unless mapped to IEC clauses and accepted by the project owner, ARSE/NIGELEC process, or donor specification.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、IEC 62196接口报告、IP和IK外壳测试证据、RCD和保护器件额定值、浪涌保护证据、在要求时提供法语安装说明，以及45°C以上室外运行并承受沙尘负荷的降额曲线。单独的中国GB/T安全报告不足以构成尼日尔项目资料包，除非已映射至IEC条款并获得项目业主、ARSE/NIGELEC流程或捐助方规格接受。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、IEC 62196接口報告、IP和IK外殼測試證據、RCD和保護器件額定值、浪湧保護證據、在要求時提供法語安裝說明，以及45°C以上室外運行並承受沙塵負荷的降額曲線。單獨的中國GB/T安全報告不足以構成尼日項目資料包，除非已映射至IEC條款並獲得項目業主、ARSE/NIGELEC流程或捐助方規格接受。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but normally required in practice where IEC evidence is specified by NIGELEC, ARSE, tender, donor, engineer, or fleet owner; exact national EVSE rule not publicly confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence without clause-level mapping and acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Niger-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851 safety evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IEC 62196 connector evidence, enclosure and surge protection records, French documentation where required, and heat/dust derating for Sahel service.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向尼日尔的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851安全证据、直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、IEC 62196接口证据、外壳及浪涌保护记录、要求时的法语文件，以及适用于萨赫勒环境的高温/沙尘降额。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向尼日的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851安全證據、直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、IEC 62196接口證據、外殼及浪湧保護記錄、要求時的法語文件，以及適用於薩赫勒環境的高溫/沙塵降額。
